ArtifactRead.description:
Frontend-facing artifact row.

The DB column is still named `uri` for historical reasons but it stores a
relative path under `/var/platform-data`. `download_url` is computed.
ArtifactRead.title: ArtifactRead

ModelVersionPromote.description:
Target stage for a ModelVersion promotion.

``production`` at-most-one enforcement is done atomically server-side:
any existing production version of the same RegisteredModel is moved
to ``archived`` inside the same transaction as the promotion.
ModelVersionPromote.title: ModelVersionPromote

schema.title: Response Get Dataset Schema Api Datasets  Dataset Id  Schema Get

delete.description: Stop the serving container (best-effort) and remove the row.

get.description: Tail of the serving container's stdout/stderr, shaped for the UI.

schema.title: Response Get Deployment Logs Api Deployments  Deployment Id  Logs Get

get.description:
Return the deployment's input schema.

Prefers the live serving container's `/schema` when it's reachable,
so any feature-name normalization it does shows up in the UI. Falls
back to the trainer-produced `input_schema.json` on disk.

schema.title: Response Get Deployment Schema Api Deployments  Deployment Id  Schema Get
Response Ingest Predictions Api Internal Predictions Post

delete.description:
Delete a registered model and every version under it.

Fails with 409 if any version is still referenced by a Deployment — the
caller must tear those down first. On success the on-disk version
directories are removed alongside the DB rows.

schema.title: Response List Versions Api Models  Model Id  Versions Get

post.description:
Kick off a new package build for a specific version.

Re-triggering always creates a fresh row — older packages stay on disk
until the cleanup job prunes them, so the user can still download in-flight
builds while a newer one assembles.

schema.title: Response List Packages For Version Api Models  Model Id  Versions  Version Id  Packages Get

post.description:
Move a ModelVersion to a target stage atomically.

When ``stage=production`` is requested, any existing production version
of the same RegisteredModel is first demoted to ``archived`` in the
same transaction, then the target is set to production. The partial
unique index from migration 0005 also enforces this at the DB level
on Postgres.

schema.title: Response Get Run Artifacts Api Runs  Run Id  Artifacts Get
Response Get Run Bias Api Runs  Run Id  Bias Get
Response Get Run Explanations Api Runs  Run Id  Explanations Get

get.description:
Replay the persisted training-log transcript for a run.

Returns one record per captured line in the shape the frontend's
TrainingLogStream already consumes. When the trainer is still running
the file may be missing or partial — the SSE channel fills the gap.

schema.title: Response Get Run Logs Api Runs  Run Id  Logs Get
Response Get Run Metrics Api Runs  Run Id  Metrics Get

get.description:
Return the parsed ``selected_hyperparams.json`` artifact for a run.

Falls back to the raw ``Run.hyperparams_json`` (labelled ``source=legacy``)
for runs trained before this artifact was introduced so the Model tab on
older runs still renders a useful payload.

schema.title: Response Get Run Selected Hyperparams Api Runs  Run Id  Selected Hyperparams Get
